questions.question:
A Deployment named `rwop-reader` in namespace `rwop-lab` is not consuming the intended `ReadWriteOncePod` claim.

Fix the workload so that:
- PVC `data-claim` stays bound to the intended storage
- the claim keeps access mode `ReadWriteOncePod`
- Deployment `rwop-reader` uses claim `data-claim`
- the volume is mounted at `/data/app`
- the Deployment becomes Available
- the running container can write `reader-ready` into `/data/app/reader.txt`

Do not replace the PersistentVolume or StorageClass. Fix the workload wiring around the existing RWOP claim.

verification.description: PVC data-claim stays bound and keeps the intended ReadWriteOncePod access mode
Deployment rwop-reader uses data-claim at /data/app and becomes Available
The running workload can write the expected marker file through the mounted RWOP volume
